description_long: This is a large, robust wooden crate with a dark, natural wood grain finish and reinforced edges. One side features a prominent diagonal wooden plank for structural support, while another side displays a yellow warning sign with a triangular explosion symbol and the text 'Explosive Material.' A third side has a large exclamation mark inside a yellow triangle, indicating caution. The crate appears to be solidly constructed, likely used for storing or transporting hazardous or sensitive materials. The top is flat and black, suitable for stacking or placing other objects. No handles or visible openings are present, and the interior is not visible from any angle.
description: A sturdy wooden crate with warning signs, reinforced with diagonal planks and a flat black top, designed for hazardous material storage.
description_view_0: This view shows a wooden crate face with a diagonal support plank and vertical wood grain.
description_view_1: This side features a yellow warning sign with an explosion symbol and the text 'Explosive Material.'
description_view_2: This view highlights another diagonal plank and a partial view of the warning sign from the adjacent side.
description_view_3: This side displays a large exclamation mark inside a yellow triangle, indicating caution.
